title: Write a minimal setup block that checks out the sandbox in manual mode
prompt: Write the body of a `setup` block for a DataCase template that checks out the sandbox from `MyApp.Repo` using `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.checkout/2` and returns `:ok`. Place this in `test/support/data_case.ex` inside a `defmodule MyApp.DataCase do ... end` module that uses `ExUnit.CaseTemplate`. The setup must call `checkout` (not `start_owner!`) and must return `:ok`.
tier_rationale: Single function call with fixed signature. Sonnet one-shots this.
